product_overview: Parlour is a high-performance, visually rich studio website that showcases services and portfolio work while enabling real-time service updates and an integrated appointment booking flow. The site emphasizes smooth animations and responsive interactions across devices.
core_goals: Deliver a memorable brand-first experience via an animated intro and refined motion system.
Provide a real-time, easily browsable services catalog synced with Supabase.
Enable a straightforward multi-step appointment booking flow with clear validation and confirmations.
Showcase studio work through a high-performance horizontal gallery with full-screen viewing and responsive media handling.

features.name: Interactive Brand Intro
features.description: Plays a branded "Scribble" animation on page load to establish tone and reveal the landing content in a performant, accessible way.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View page load animation -> See scribble animation complete -> See landing content revealed and site becomes interactive
Navigate to / -> Attempt to view page load animation -> Animation fails to load or times out -> See accessible static hero fallback and navigation remains usable

features.name: Services Catalog
features.description: Real-time service listing with categories, durations, and pricing, kept in sync with Supabase so studio owners can update offerings instantly.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View services grid -> Filter by category -> See filtered services with titles, durations, and prices -> Initiate booking for chosen service

Navigate to / -> View services grid -> Attempt to fetch or filter services -> Service data fails to load due to network or API error -> See error state with retry option or cached/stale data displayed

features.name: Appointment Booking
features.description: A multi-step booking flow that lets users select one or more services, pick an available date, provide contact details, and submit an appointment to Supabase with clear processing and confirmation states.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Initiate booking -> Select services -> Choose date via custom calendar -> Enter name, email, and communication preference -> Submit booking -> See processing state -> See booking confirmation success

Navigate to / -> Initiate booking -> Select services -> Skip required contact details -> Submit booking -> See validation feedback highlighting missing fields -> Enter missing details -> Submit booking -> See success confirmation
Navigate to / -> Initiate booking -> Complete form and submit booking -> Backend POST request fails due to network or API error -> See submission error and option to retry or save draft

features.name: Portfolio Studio Work
features.description: A horizontal, high-performance slider of studio projects with drag/scroll navigation and a responsive full-screen gallery modal for detailed viewing.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View portfolio slider -> Drag/scroll studio work slider to browse projects -> Open gallery modal for a project -> View responsive full-screen image -> Close gallery modal and return to slider
Navigate to / -> View portfolio slider -> Attempt to load full-size gallery images -> Images are slow or fail to load -> See lazy-loaded placeholders and an option to retry viewing the full image

routes.description: Main landing page with all studio content and booking system

features.name: Services Catalog
features.description: Real-time service listing with categories and pricing

features.name: Appointment Booking
features.description: Multi-step booking process with service selection and calendar
